decisions.summary: Routine spec said push directly to main, but PR #151 used draft-PR pattern instead.
decisions.question: Should Big Boi push directly to main going forward, or keep the draft-PR workflow?

decisions.summary: drizzle-zod@0.8.3 imports zod/v4 while project uses zod v3 — blocks 304 remaining TS errors.
decisions.question: Pick (a) downgrade drizzle-zod to ^0.7.x, or (b) migrate codebase imports zod -> zod/v4.

decisions.summary: Two open draft PRs touch overlapping dashboard files; #157 supersedes most of #152 with added 'why' reasoning.
decisions.question: Merge #152 first then rebase #157, close #152 in favor of #157, or merge them in order as-is?

decisions.summary: 9-line observability-only fix in productionMetricsPopulation.ts. Build clean.
decisions.question: Approve and merge?

decisions.summary: PR #158 ready for review. 5 remaining moderate CVEs in esbuild/vite/drizzle-kit need a coordinated `npm audit fix --force` (Vite v8 major bump).
decisions.question: Approve the major bump in this PR, defer to next week, or open a tracking issue?

emailDelivery.failureReason: sendpulse-api module not resolvable from emailService.ts (node_modules absent in routine sandbox); SENDPULSE_API_USER_ID/SECRET also unset. Email composed at /tmp/digest-email.{html,txt} but not delivered.
emailDelivery.subject: Daily digest — 5 need your call
